ab: apiya ka pamood ko pa jimo so nizpi?
en: A: Can I borrow money from you?

ab: jiapiya! yapira mo apen a nizpi?
en: B: Yes! How much do you need?

ab: ko nikahamangan o nizpi ko. apiya ka pamood ko pa jimo so nizpi?
ch: A:我忘記帶錢了，我可以跟你借錢嗎?
en: A: I forgot to bring money, can I borrow money from you?

ab: apiya ori do ko jia nimapalolo so nizpi!
en: B: I don't have any money either!

ab: ko nikahamangan o nizpi ko. apiya ka pamood ko pa jimo so nizpi?
ch: A:我忘記帶錢了，我可以跟你借錢嗎?
en: A: I forgot to bring money, can I borrow money from you?

ab: taosya, ta mo jianipaoli pa o nivood mo jiaken a nizpi.
ch: B:不要，上次借的錢你都還沒還我。
en: B: No, you haven't paid me back the money you borrowed last time.

ab: apiya ka vood ko so talili mo?
en: A: Can I borrow your clothes?

ab: jiapiya. ahap do dang.
en: B: Well, you take it yourself.

ab: apiya ka vood ko so vakong mo?
en: A: Can I borrow your book?

ab: ko na nitoro ji Masarey a na vooden.
en: B: I lent it to si Masarey.

ab: vooden ko pa o tagzezeng mo an?
ch: A:請借給我你的眼鏡好嗎?
en: A: Can I borrow your glasses, please?

ab: ahap,simarow am, paolien mo jiaken.
ch: B: 好，但是明天要還給我。
en: B: Okay, but you have to give it back to me tomorrow.

ab: yamacimoy, ko jianipalolo o payong ko, vooden ko pa o payong mo an?
ch: A:下雨了，我沒有帶傘，借我傘好嗎?
en: A: It's raining, I don't have an umbrella, can you lend me your umbrella?

ab: yasa o payong ko, key! oya payong ta!
ch: B: 我只有一把傘，我們一起撐吧!
en: B: I only have an umbrella, let's stick together!

ab: oya nivood ko jimo a vakong,ko paolien jimo.
ch: A:這是你上次借我的書，還給你。
en: A: This is the book you borrowed from me last time, I give it back to you.

ab: simian so ikakza mo a citahen a vakong am,ipanci mo jiaken.
ch: B:還想看什麼書都可以跟我說。
en: B:You can tell me what else you want to read.

ab: simanngo am, paolien ko jimo o nizpi?
en: A: When do I have to pay you back?

ab: cyaham! simian rana so nizpi mo am.
ch: B:沒關係，你有錢的時候再說。
en: B: It doesn't matter, you can talk about it when you have money.

ab: simanngo am, paolien mo nizpi ko?
en: B: When are you going to pay me back?

ab: simarow am, toro ko jimo.
en: A: I will return it to you tomorrow.

ab: simanngo am, paolien mo vakong ko?
en: B: When are you going to return my book?

ab: no kakyab am nipaoli ko na jimo asyo?
ch: B:我昨天不是已經還你了嗎?
en: A: Didn't I return it to you yesterday?

ab: nipavood na jimo o ipeyvatvatek ya ni Mateneng?
ch: A:這支筆是si Mateneng借你的嗎?
en: A: Did si Mateneng lend you this pen?

ab: nan, ko nivood jia sicyarow ya.
en: B: Yes, I borrowed it from him today.

ab: ni vood mo o ipeyvatvatek ya ji Mateneng?
ch: A:這支筆是你跟si Mateneng借的嗎?
en: A: Did you borrow this pen from si Mateneng?

ab: beken,oya am, na nisazangan ni ina.
en: B: No, this is what mom bought.

ab: yabo rana o asin, mangey ka mangap so asin ji Maomey.
ch: A:沒有鹽了，去跟si Maomey拿點鹽。
en: A: No more salt, go get some salt from si Maomey.

ab: noon, mangey ko mangap.
en: B: Okay, I'll get it.

ab: pancian si Maomey ta paolien na o nizpi ko.
en: B: Go tell si Maomey to give me my money back.

ab: yapira na nivood jimo a nizpi?
en: A: How much does she owe you?
